positive: A sophisticated, seamless repeating pattern design featuring stylized celestial bodies, abstract geometric forms, and elegant tropical flora (like monstera leaves and stylized palm fronds). The artwork must use a minimalist, graphic black line-art style with geometric overlays. Composition should be highly structured and symmetrical, centered for optimal placement on apparel. Use only three colors: deep indigo, vibrant gold, and solid black. The overall aesthetic must be Art Nouveau meets Modern Abstract, resembling a high-end tattoo stencil or intricate woodcut. Flat lighting, vector quality, high contrast, and perfect repetition.
negative: blur, artifact, noise, text, watermark, logo, trademark, low resolution, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, ugly, messy, gradient, grayscale, photo, 3d render, realistic, signature
